summary: Fix namespace drift in 5 remaining package.json name fields and repair 2 broken cross-package dependency references. Packages fixed: integration-layer, model-router-x, plugin-lifecycle, proofcheck, shared-orchestration. Cross-deps fixed: model-router-x deps on context-governor and fallback-doctor; integration-layer peerDeps on skill-rl-manager, learning-engine, shared-orchestration.
root_cause: Same @jackoatmon/* namespace drift as part1. Additionally, model-router-x had functional dependency breakage referencing @jackoatmon/ names that no longer match the workspace resolver after the wave 5-7 renames.
fix_approach: Renamed name fields to flat opencode-* and updated all dependency/peerDependency entries to use the matching flat names. Resolves workspace:* resolution failures.

validation.notes: bun test suite passes. Cross-deps are workspace:* refs — they resolve at install time, no runtime code paths changed.
